game_name: Dungeons & Dragons: Eye of the Beholder

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Party-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: First-person dungeon crawler with party control (4-6 characters) using point-and-click interface. Movement controlled by manipulating party position within dungeon grid rather than direct character physics.

special_mechanics.name: Grid-based Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Game uses grid-based dungeon navigation similar to Dungeon Master, not continuous physics-based movement

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative). Eye of the Beholder is a first-person dungeon crawler with grid-based movement, not a platformer or action game with traditional physics parameters. No documented gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, or sub-pixel system data available. Movement mechanics are tactical/grid-based rather than physics-driven. SNES port released April 1994 by Capcom.
sources_used: wikipedia - Eye of the Beholder (video game)
